name: Cropper

aliases.name: CropData
aliases.comment:
Helper type intended for wrapping data sent to javascript via port
Example:
port cropperData : CropData -> Cmd msg

aliases.name: ImageData
aliases.comment:
Helper type intended for wrapping data from javascript via port
Example:
port cropperWithImage : (ImageData -> msg) -> Sub msg

values.name: crop
values.comment: Set crop size. Will be limited to image size.
values.type: Cropper.Model -> { width : Basics.Int, height : Basics.Int } -> Cropper.Model

values.name: cropData
values.comment: Get all data required (by CanvasRenderingContext2D.drawImage) to crop the image

values.name: cropOrigin
values.comment: Get starting point of crop area over imageSize

values.name: init
values.comment: Use this function to initialize the module with url to image and a crop size.
values.type: { url : String.String, crop : { width : Basics.Int, height : Basics.Int } } -> Cropper.Model

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: TEA subscriptions needs to be hooked up for mouse dragging

name: Cropper.Types

aliases.name: CropData
aliases.type: { url : String.String, size : Cropper.Types.Rect, crop : Cropper.Types.Rect, resized : Cropper.Types.Rect, origin : Cropper.Types.Point }

aliases.name: Drag
aliases.comment: filling out these docs is a drag

aliases.name: Image
aliases.type: { src : String.String, width : Basics.Int, height : Basics.Int }

aliases.name: Model
aliases.type: { url : String.String, crop : Cropper.Types.Rect, image : Maybe.Maybe Cropper.Types.Image, boundingClientRect : Cropper.Types.Rectangle, pivot : Cropper.Types.Vector, zoom : Basics.Float, drag : Maybe.Maybe Cropper.Types.Drag }

aliases.name: Point
aliases.comment: point. x, y, all that business
